summary: Comprehensive testing of Actor's Companion file upload fixes and Add Context feature. All key functionality working correctly including iOS-compatible file upload, PDF processing, context integration, and mobile responsiveness.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 0 voices despite API key being configured
minor_bugs.impact: TTS voice selection may not work properly

passed_tests: File upload zone uses <label> element (iOS compatible)
PDF upload with context field works correctly
Image upload with context field works correctly
Context fields render and toggle properly
Amber dot appears when context fields have content
Context is prepended to text analysis
Mobile view shows camera tab correctly
File input accepts image/* and .pdf files
Text analysis with context integration works
All backend APIs return correct status codes
Context fields use responsive grid layout
